name: Exalted Prime Blade
description: Summon a sword of pure light and immense power.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script error related to Excalibur’s Exalted Blade.

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Update 32
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Excalibur Umbra randomly deactivating Exalted Blade when playing as Operator. 
Umbra will now keep Exalted Blade active, and will turn off only if your Exalted Blade deactivates.

patchlogs.name: Gara Prime: Update 30.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur's Exalted Blade being invisible when using Pistols and Glaives.

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.changes: Added shadow casting light to Excalibur’s Exalted Blade when Deferred Rendering is enabled.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Railjack Revisited (Part 1): Update 27.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error that could occur if you were swinging Excalibur’s Exalted Blade at the same time as you activated a context action.

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Hotfix 27.2.2
patchlogs.changes: Increased the base Status Chance of Exalted Blade and Desert Wind to 15%, while also changing the Chromatic Blade and Reactive Storm Augments to stack in the same manner other Status Mods do. This was missed in the Status changes but is a necessary change now. The following reflects the new Maximums:

patchlogs.name: Empyrean: Ivara Prime 27.0.12 + 27.0.12.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur’s Chromatic Blade elemental FX and statistics on Exalted Blade not updating after you change your Energy colour. Instead, they are stuck on the default Electricity element.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Hotfix 24.7.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Secondary Energy not being inherited by Exalted weapons (Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, etc).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon Remaster: Update 24.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed UI indicating that Excalibur’s Exalted Blade is still Channeling if you Transfer to O

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.2.7 + 24.2.7.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur missing his ground slam sound when using his Exalted Blade.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Hotfix 23.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Exodia Valor applying to Excalibur’s Exalted Blade.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed new players who picked Excalibur not receiving his Exalted Blade in the Arsenal, making it unModdable. Affected players will now see the intended Exalted Blade Arsenal slot.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.3 - Limbo Prime
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Upgrade screen for some Exalted weapons (Exalted Blade, Artemis Bow, etc) showing the name of the weapon in mixed case instead of all CAPS.
Fixed Excalibur missing his Radial Blind sound when doing slide attack with Exalted Blade.

patchlogs.name: The Sacrifice: Hotfix 23.0.2 + 23.0.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed entering your Arsenal with Excalibur’s Exalted Blade active causing no Mods to appear in the Modding UI.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Arcanes working inconsistently on Exalted Abilities (Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, etc) or Weapon Abilities (Titania’s Razorwing, etc).

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.10.0
patchlogs.changes: Warframe Specters are now much smarter! If you don't recall, Specters are craftable gear you can equip to summon an AI companion in battle. We've done a general intelligence pass on their proficiency with Weapons, and we've also updated their power-casting logic. Virtually every power is now castable with only a few exceptions! Specters CANNOT cast the following Abilities: Vauban's Minelayer, Ivara's Zipline, Titania's Razorwing, Nekros’ Desecrate and Shadows of the Dead, Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Valkyr’s Hysteria, Wukong’s Primal Fury, Cloud Walker, and Defy, Atlas’ Petrify and Tectonics, Limbo's entire kit (save for the damage aspect of Banish), and finally Zephyr’s Dive Bomb.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Exalted Blade local FX on cast not working.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.3
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed not being able to Melee again upon throwing the Sigma & Octanis shield while using Exalted Blade on Excalibur, until you deactivate and reactivate the power. 
Fixed a script crash that would occur when trying to Mod your Melee weapon in the Simulacrum Arsenal while Excalibur’s Exalted Blade is active.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.6.0 + Hotfix 22.6.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Exalted Blade flickering at certain angles.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a script error when casting Excalibur’s Exalted Blade ability.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that would occur when activating Excalibur’s Exalted Blade (and other similar abilities) then entering the Arsenal and going to the Melee weapon upgrades screen in Captura and the Simulacrum.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.8 + 21.0.8.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where Clients downed while using Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Wukong’s Primal Fury, or Valkyr’s Hysteria would be unable to switch weapons when revived.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.7
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed casting and deactivating Excalibur’s Exalted Blade, Wukong’s Primal Fury, or Valkyr’s Hysteria while in Dual-Wield mode resulting in the UI stating the name of your Pistol and ability used.

patchlogs.name: Chains of Harrow: Hotfix 21.0.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Berserker Mod not applying to Excalibur’s Exalted Blade and its waves.

patchlogs.name: Update 21: Chains of Harrow
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Chromatic Blade Augment not applying elemental FX on Exalted Blade’s projectiles.

patchlogs.name: Oberon Prime: Update 20.7.0
patchlogs.changes: Oberon Prime: Update 20.7.0new Augmentsexcalibur (Exalted Blade)Mag (Magnetize)Chroma (Effigy)Volt (Electric Shield)Find These New Augments As Syndicate Offerings Today!Changes:

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.changes:
Increased the flight speed of Excalibur's Exalted Blade projectiles in Conclave.
Increased the flight speed of Excalibur's Exalted Blade projectiles in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.2 (Phase One: DB Upgrades)
patchlogs.fixes: Potential fix for Clients with Hysteria/Exalted Blade/Primal Fury/Artemis Bow active and running into a Nullifier briefly causing complete ability/melee/weapon switch lockout on next cast.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed script errors with Exalted Blade/Hysteria/Primal Fury.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.9.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed using Valkyr's Hysteria/Excalibur's Exalted Blade/Wukong's Primal Fury during a ‘Weapon Only’ Sortie resulting in "Power In Use" when casting any ability for the remainder of the mission.

patchlogs.name: Update 19: The War Within
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade wall attack not producing an energy wave as per: https://www.reddit.com/r/Warframe/comments/57za5m/exalted_blade_not_shooting_wave_if_wall_attacking/

patchlogs.name: The Vacuum Within: Hotfix 1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash that would occur when Ammo Case would trigger on a weapon with no ammo (Exalted Blade, etc).

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: Hotfix 12
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash when casting Exalted Blade/Hysteria/etc while you have an active Glaive thrown out.

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.changes:
Exalted Blade 
Increased damage of Excalibur’s Exalted Blade projectiles in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.11.0 & 18.11.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed melee combo timer not counting down during an ultimate ability that transforms a weapon. (Hysteria, Exalted Blade, etc.)

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur and Valkyr not receiving credit for kills from Exalted Blade and Hysteria respectively.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes:
Limited the number of Mods that can interact with Exalted Blade as per: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/511036-pc-psa-covert-lethality-exalted-blade-changes/
Reduced camera shake FX when using Excalibur’s Exalted Blade.

patchlogs.name: Update 17: Echoes Of The Sentient
patchlogs.changes: Energy effects from elemental Mods will no longer display on Excalibur’s Exalted Blade.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade’s energy waves not being stopped by Corpus Nullifier shields.
Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade improperly taking on stances from other equipped melee weapons and vice versa.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.11.5
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed players receiving a ‘power in use’ message when casting Excalibur’s Exalted Blade while switching to a melee weapon.
Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade not actually showing the weapon in hand if cast while switching to a melee weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.10.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed channeling when using Excalibur’s Exalted Blade’s melee or projectile attacks not consuming additional energy.
Fixed an issue preventing Syndicate Mods from properly working with Exalted Blade.
Fixed Exalted Blade not properly gaining Excalibur’s passive upgrades with the proper melee weapon equipped.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.9.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Exalted Blade’s energy waves not receiving a boost from damage Mods when used by Clients.
Fixed Exalted Blade’s energy wave not benefiting from channeling buffs.
Fixed Clients using Exalted Blade not gaining benefits from Syndicate Mods.
Fixed the Proto Glaive skin causing Exalted Blade to not appear properly in Excalibur’s hand.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.9.3
patchlogs.changes: Reduced Stamina drain on Auto-Parry when using Exalted Blade.
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed damage from Exalted Blade’s energy waves not scaling properly with Mods.
Fixed the some cases of Exalted Blade not appearing when activated when used with certain melee weapons.
Fixed some cases of Exalted Blade use not allowing players to melee attack when activated or deactivated.
Fixed Exalted Blade’s energy waves not getting a damage buff from Channeling or applying unique Mod effects (such as Life Strike).
Fixed an issue with the Proto Glaive skin with Exalted Blade preventing waves from appearing.
Fixed an issue with Exalted Blade damage not being correct on Clients.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.9.2 + 16.9.2.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade’s melee attacks always counting as though it were channeled.
Fixed Excalibur’s Exalted Blade copying melee Stance Mods, which would break functionality of the Ability.
Fixed an issue causing Excalibur’s Exalted Blade to not properly release energy waves.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.9.1 + 16.9.1.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Excalibur's Exalted Blade not inheriting any melee mods. This fix now allows the damage of Exalted Blade attacks to scale based on the mods of your Melee weapon.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.9.0
patchlogs.fixes:
Fourth Ability: New Ability: Exalted Blade: Excalibur summons a sword of pure light and immense power.
Excalibur’s Abilities have all been given a visual overhaul in line with his new Exalted Blade ability.
